title: linum littorale var. littorale
intro: Linum littorale var. littorale, also known as sea flax or littoral flax, is a subspecies of the Linum littorale plant, a flowering plant that belongs to the family Linaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Linum littorale var. littorale include soothing skin irritations, reducing anxiety and stress, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
